        "spotlight": "February foal; 15,000gns foal, 42,000euros yearling; fifth foal; half-brother to 6f AW winner Black Cab (RPR 56); dam 6f winner (86), sister to 5f/6f Group 3 winner Swiss Diva, half-sister to 5f Group 3 winner Swiss Spirit, out of 5f Listed winner; has lots of speed in pedigree and she's an interesting newcomer for yard that that won this race last year."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "32,000euros foal, \u00a324,000 yearling; first foal; dam unraced sister to winners Rhythmic Intent (useful 1m2f-14.5f) and Fortune Triple (HK 1m1f/1m3f), is granddaughter of French Oaks winner Caerlina; has plenty of stamina on dam's side and he could be a longer-term prospect."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ardad colt; third foal; dam 9.4f/1m2f winner (including 2yo; RPR 87), half-sister to 1m Listed winner Staying On, out of maiden half-sister to Rockfel winner Yawl, family of Oaks winner Talent; has speed and stamina in pedigree and interesting to see how he figures in market."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran green and hung left from halfway but he was only just run out of third on his debut at Thirsk (good) two weeks ago; that was an encouraging start behind a useful prospect and he's a key player if he can build on that."

        "spotlight": "Smart pedigree; did really well to win a 1m fillies' novice at Chelmsford in December, blowing the start and having plenty to do turning for home but producing a fast finish to win under a hand ride; strong claims despite her penalty."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Never in contention on her Wolverhampton debut in February (8.6f); fitted with a hood for her second start and she recorded a shock 50-1 success in a five-runner event over 1m at Southwell 23 days ago; this looks tougher under a penalty."

        "spotlight": "Second foal of a Group-placed 1m/1m2f winner (RPR 115), herself from a good family; makes her debut for a stable in good form and she needs a look in the betting."

        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dropped away in the final furlong on her Salisbury debut last October (7f, good; trained by David Menuisier), a race that developed into a three-furlong sprint; should appreciate today's longer trip and she's an interesting contender starting out for William Haggas (same owners)."

        "fair_odds": "8.64",

        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last September's Newmarket debut (7f, good to firm) was full of promise; failed to build on it when fifth of ten at Chelmsford last month but that run may have been needed and she can surely do better back on turf and upped in trip."

  {
    "course": "Leicester",

    "draw_bias": "high",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Zoulu Chief (GB)",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Heather Main",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "90",

        "dam_sire": "Helmet",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-11",

        "fair_odds": "5.76",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "+5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran creditably at Lingfield in January when bidding for a 6f AW double; 8lb higher than when second at Newmarket (7f) on last turf attempt but he's proved consistent since being gelded and his first two handicap wins were on good to firm; in the mix."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Prince Of India (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Marco Botti",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "138-50",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "62.4",
        "model_pct": "16.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.96",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won four times during a progressive campaign last year but he's come up short in Listed/Group 3 events this spring; seems ideally suited by fast ground but he's still 4lb higher than for his last win and has some work to do back in a handicap."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Fast Track Harry",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Clive Cox",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "70-117",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "56.7",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.86",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual turf winner who made it 2-2 on AW when completing a double at Newcastle (6f; off 4lb lower) last month; didn't fire in his hat-trick bid at Kempton but he still has potential and is not ruled out in suitable conditions back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Ten Pounds (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Finley Marsh",
        "trainer": "Joey Ramsden",
        "ts": "109",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "341-48",
        "sire": "Ten Sovereigns",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "56.3",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.52",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record of 5-10 for Harry Charlton and his last win was in a conditions event at Kempton (6f, AW) in October; ran without his declared tongue-tie when fourth on stable debut at Southwell in January but he finished down the field in another Class 2 handicap at Newcastle two weeks later; conditions should be fine on this return to turf but he needs to step up again after another break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Berkshire Whisper",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "98",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "024-03",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "55.7",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.50",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Completed an AW hat-trick when scoring on his handicap debut at Newcastle (6f) last April; held in six subsequent runs but he went close off this mark at Southwell in November and was a creditable third at Newcastle three weeks ago; now returns to turf but he ran well in a fast-ground Listed event last spring and he's still unexposed in this sphere; in the mix."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Dark Cloud Rising",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "0515-0",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.56",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner who ended his 2025 campaign with a success and creditable effort over 5f at Newcastle (AW); was as good as ever in those two runs but he was well below form on his reappearance at Pontefract (5f, good to soft) 18 days ago; may have needed that run but he needs more progress to defy this mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Betsen",
        "jockey": "Ray Dawson",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "-44347",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Norse Dancer",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-6",
        "score": "54.2",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.03",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won on stable debut at Southwell (6f, Tapeta) in November and he's posted some solid efforts since then; hard to rule out another good run but this is a step back up in grade and sole turf win was 19 months ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "model_pct": "5.3%",
        "fair_odds": "18.68",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Listed winner (5f/6f) for his previous yards and he's run respectably in two 5f handicaps for his new trainer this spring; needs to find some extra spark but he's edging down the weights and this step back up in trip looks a good move."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well handicapped on his best form last season but he's not easy to predict and has been up and down during another spell in Bahrain since December; comes with risks attached back in Britain and most of his wins have been at Chester; tongue-tie worn last time is removed."
      },

        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-12.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "On lengthy losing but he's a smart handicapper on his day and he returned from five months off with a good third at Newcastle (6f, AW) two weeks ago; should benefit from that run and he remains well treated on his second in the Stewards' Cup last August; interesting contender."
      },

        "fair_odds": "21.66",

        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two 5f wins for Roger Varian but latest was in June 2023 and he was quiet last season; returns for new yard after wind surgery but he has a mixed record when fresh and this is highly competitive; down the list."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time AW winner who has finished close up on Tapeta (5f/6f) in his last three runs; record of 1-26 on turf but he's on a lower mark in this sphere and he ran well in the Great St Wilfrid at Ripon (6f, good to firm) last summer; dangerous."
      },

        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended last season with a game win in Group 3 at Ascot (6f, soft) in October; repeatedly met trouble when only seventh in Saudi Arabia (a race he'd won two years earlier) in February and things didn't really go his way again in a Listed race at Doncaster last month; has possibilities on this drop back in class and his last handicap win was off 1lb higher."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Won a 6f Fairyhouse maiden over this trip last July; best form when just denied in a Listed event at the same track in September (6f yielding); below form in the Goffs Million on only 7f attempt; soft ground probably not ideal on seasonal debut at Cork."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Frescobaldi (IRE)",
        "jockey": "James Ryan",
        "trainer": "Daniel James Murphy",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "52153-",

        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "52.7",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.77",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ex-Aidan O'Brien won the 7f Convivial at York on his third outing; confirmed a fair standard of form in 7f Listed races at Doncaster and Dundalk before changing hands for 100,000gns; useful prospect for Danny Murphy; unlikely to match former stablemate Charles Darwin."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Starman Tom",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "Kieran P Cotter",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "93",

        "dam_sire": "Multiplex",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "49.2",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.31",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed promise in finishing second behind last season's Queen Mary fourth on debut in a 5f maiden at Cork last month; beaten favourite when third in a big-field 6f maiden of a relatively modest standard at the Curragh last Sunday."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "trainer": "J A Stack",

        "fair_odds": "15.66",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Debut third at the Curragh four weeks ago suggests she can win races; this looks much too demanding at this stage of her career, but worth a shot with black type available."
      }
    ]
  },

        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His latest Newcastle defeat isn't the run to judge him on and he had been progressing well beforehand; no problem with the return to turf and stepping back up to 7f will be of benefit; interesting with cheekpieces now given a go."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Khafiz (IRE)",

        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "97",

        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",

        "model_pct": "13.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.71",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-7.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Began 2025 with 7f novice wins at Kempton and Doncaster; ended his 3yo campaign with a close third at Doncaster (7f, soft) 183 days ago; sold out of Roger Varian's stable for 85,000gns in October; still has low mileage, is yet to run a poor race when wearing a hood and is starting out for a trainer in great form; lots to like."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Cosi Bello (GB)",
        "jockey": "Paddy Bradley",
        "trainer": "Charlie Fellowes",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "1124-",

        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "60.9",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.13",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-9.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Began his career with two 7f AW wins and he was a fine second at Chester on his handicap debut last June (7f, good); fourth of 17 in a 1m handicap at Ascot when last seen nine months ago, a run that can be marked up as he raced away from the first three home; still has potential and he returns with his stable back in better form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Caburn",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "James Tate",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "001-83",
        "sire": "Twilight Son",
        "dam_sire": "Clodovil",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "58.3",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.28",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a valuable pot as a 2yo; slow to come to hand as a 3yo but he changed yards last summer and made an impressive winning return from a gelding operation last September (6f, good to soft; cheekpieces on for the first time); fine reappearance when third in the Listed Cammidge Trophy at Doncaster (6f, good to soft) four weeks ago; raised 3lb for his troubles and still has to prove his stamina for 7f."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Korker",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "110",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "8320-0",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Spectrum",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "57.4",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.50",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well beaten at Doncaster on his return but he wasn't well drawn and has a modest record fresh; stepping up to 7f will give him more time to claw back the ground he's likely to forfeit at the start; on a dangerous mark and he's a lively outsider, for all his losing run stretches back to October 2023."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Croupier",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Joel Parkinson & Sue Smith",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "fair_odds": "13.92",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive handicapper for the Crisfords and he was last seen finishing second in the Buckingham Palace at Royal Ascot (7f, good to firm) in June 2023; sold for 20,000gns in May 2024; only dropped 3lb during his 1038-day absence; likely best watched."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had strong handicap form over 1m in the second half of 2025, finishing second at York's Ebor meeting (good to firm) before recording back-to-back wins at Goodwood (good to soft and good); ran well for third in a Nottingham Listed race when last seen 178 days ago; only seventh in this race 12 months ago and he's 4lb higher today."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close third in Listed company at Wolverhampton last month on his first attempt at 7f and he wasn't beaten for a lack of stamina; not at his best in a hot sprint handicap at Newcastle on Good Friday; no surprise to see him bounce back with a big run."

        "edge": "-8.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Strong handicap form over 7f last summer, winning at Goodwood and Chepstow as well as finishing second in a 20-runner event at Ascot (all when wearing blinkers); still feasibly weighted on that form and he went without headgear when down the field in the Lincoln; the blinkers return today and he's a leading contender."

      {

      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Under The Twilight",

        "trainer": "Michael Blake",

        "model_pct": "19.3%",

        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Should be all the better for her Doncaster reappearance and she's back on the same mark as for her Windsor success (6f, good to firm) last June; however, all her turf wins have come there and at Salisbury and this is the first time she's run on this track."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Dapper Valley (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "8-8703",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Canford Cliffs",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "53.3",
        "model_pct": "14.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.84",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-9.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had ups and downs since showing decent form earlier in career and was well treated when starting out for this trainer in 2025, winning three of his last four 6f starts on AW and turf; went down only narrowly back on turf (good to firm; headgear left off) in UAE during March and he's of interest now back with former yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Ormolulu (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Gemma Tutty",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "50673-",
        "sire": "Havana Gold",
        "dam_sire": "Arcano",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "52.3",
        "model_pct": "12.4%",
        "fair_odds": "8.05",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Weighted to go well on best turf form and the drying ground shouldn't cause her any grief, having run so well on good to firm at York (6f) last June; also a winner of her one C&D start, in 2023, and the booking of Billy Loughnane signals intent; has prospects despite lacking a recent run."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Dashing Dick (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "William Stone",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "58351-",
        "sire": "Cable Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "11.4%",
        "fair_odds": "8.81",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Said goodbye to 2025 with a Newmarket win (6f, good to soft) in November; has won on good to firm but he missed a recent intended return on the surface and this might be needed anyway (soundly beaten here last April)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Justcallmepete",
        "jockey": "Dougie Costello",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "-45451",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Efisio",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "11.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.95",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has a better strike-rate on AW than turf but he's capable of useful 6f form on grass and made short work of his rivals at Bath (extended 5f, good) last week; now 6lb higher but this mark isn't beyond him on past exploits; would have welcomed rain but still considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Mr Lightside",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "17",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "075340",
        "sire": "Earthlight",
        "dam_sire": "War Front",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "48.8",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.28",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Can lead; smart 2yo who began 3yo season on a mark of 102; has shown just humdrum form in three turf handicaps, despite a sliding mark, and was way back behind Justcallmepete at Bath last week; has it to prove now."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Navan",
    "time": "15:05",
    "race_name": "BAR 1 Betting Vintage Crop Stakes (Listed Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m6f",
    "going": "Good To Yielding",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Scandinavia (USA)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "120",
        "rpr": "122",
        "or": "117",
        "form": "15111-",
        "sire": "Justify",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "74.2",
        "model_pct": "36.3%",
        "fair_odds": "2.75",
        "best_dec": "1.91",
        "edge": "-25.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won four of his five races at three, the exception when a close-up fifth behind Carmers in the 1m6f Queen's Vase; improved with cheekpieces, winning a five-runner 1m5f Group 3 at Newmarket by almost 9l and mastering older stablemate Illinois in the Goodwood Cup (2m, good); dug deep to hold off Rahieb on soft ground in the St Leger (Carmers fifth); top-class stayer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Carmers (IRE)",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "P Twomey",
        "ts": "116",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "113",
        "form": "11125-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "66.0",
        "model_pct": "19.9%",
        "fair_odds": "5.03",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won his first three races, notably 1m6f Group 2 Queen's Vase at Royal Ascot, beating the subsequent Geoffrey Freer winner; Furthur; lost his unbeaten record but emerged with credit in taking second in the 1m4f Great Voltigeur at York; hung left and dropped away to finish fifth behind Scandinavia when running on soft for the first time in the St Leger."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Emit",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "122",
        "rpr": "124",
        "or": "111",
        "form": "9122-4",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Kitten's Joy",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "58.4",
        "model_pct": "11.4%",
        "fair_odds": "8.80",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent last season apart from a poor run in the Hampton Court Stakes at Royal Ascot. went close in a 1m2f Group 3 at the Curragh in May; Listed winner at Gowran (1m4f, good) in July before runner-up in Group 2 and Group 3 (both over 1m7f on very soft ground) in France; failed to show his best form when fourth behind Layfayette on reappearance at the Curragh."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Layfayette",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "Noel Meade",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "2067-1",
        "sire": "French Navy",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "56.7",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "9.97",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Winner of ten races; last of six stakes race wins was in 2023 Royal Whip over 1m2f at the Curragh; however, he proved that he retains considerable ability and enthusiasm when winning a conditions event over this trip at the Curragh on seasonal debut;  (Dallas Star third, Emit fourth), that was his first 1m6f attempt, on his 47th outing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sunchart",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "Andrew Slattery",
        "ts": "101",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "/168-3",
        "sire": "Teofilo",
        "dam_sire": "Dubai Destination",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "54.4",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.77",
        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Useful dual-purpose sort, 3-34 on Flat (and second on ten occasions); his only two stakes race wins from 28 attempts have been in the 1m2f Naas event in which he was third of eight last month; suited by testing conditions, drying ground against him."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Leinster (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ronan Whelan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "14419-",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "54.1",
        "model_pct": "8.3%",
        "fair_odds": "12.04",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Stepped outside of handicap company (fourth in Chester Cup and in Ascot Stakes) to win a four-runner St Leger Trial at the Curragh last August, readily brushing aside front-running Dallas Star in the final furlong; faced a very stiff task but ran no sort of race when tailed off in the Irish St Leger."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Dallas Star",
        "jockey": "Donagh O'Connor",
        "trainer": "Robson De Aguiar",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "28-233",
        "sire": "Cloth Of Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Sadler's Wells",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "48.7",
        "model_pct": "5.6%",
        "fair_odds": "17.90",
        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Leopardstown Group 3 in April 2024 (1m2f, heavy); last win was at Dundalk early last year; no match for Leinster in a St Leger trial at the Curragh last August; twice placed in small-field AW events during the winter; well held in third behind Layfayette at the Curragh early this month; up against it."
      }
    ]
  },

        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ready winner of a 1m novice at Newcastle in January on his second outing; flopped when odds-on at Wolverhampton last month but was reported to have an irregular heartbeat afterwards; moves back up in trip for his handicap debut and he remains capable of better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins over shorter as a 3yo; improved when second at Kempton on his seasonal return last month (1m) and when third at Nottingham 17 days ago he found himself poorly positioned; well worth another crack at this trip and he should make a bold bid."
      },

        "spotlight": "Only four ran when she won her novice at Newcastle (1m2f) last September; better form in handicaps on her last two starts, second at Newcastle (1m4f) and a close sixth in a Class 2 at Lingfield when last seen in December; still has time to better now returned to turf."

        "spotlight": "Consistent form in defeat in seven turf runs as a juvenile over 6f-7.5f; way below her best on AW debut at Dundalk in October; demonstrated a good attitude to take a 7.5l fifth on seasonal return at Bellewstown (1m, soft); dropped 1lb and could improve."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "AW maiden winner was successful on turf twice last autumn at Cork (1m, yielding) and Roscommon (7.5f, soft); ran some solid runs in defeat afterwards; capable of more than what she has shown in two runs this season."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Moderate form overall in six runs for Dermot Weld apart from a standout runner-up finish on handicap debut in a 21-runner contest at Leopardstown in a first-time visor (1m1f, good); that run came after an absence so perhaps this is the time to catch him on stable/seasonal debut."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-31 on turf but he acted perfectly well on the surface in Ireland; first two AW wins for this yard came over 7f but he wasn't bothered by the return to 6f when winning at Wolverhampton 19 days ago; this stiff 6f should suit fine; solid chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Starsong",

        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",

        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both turf wins on Brighton's sharp track but she made up plenty of ground when a never-nearer third in this race (good) last year and it wouldn't surprise to see her return to form after a low-key Southwell run last time, having gone close there on her reappearance the time before."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Cameley Days (GB)",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Chris Dwyer",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "71",

        "dam_sire": "Arcano",
        "stall": 10,

        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "12.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.19",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well held on AW in November but progressive on turf for new yard previously, following a close second at Yarmouth (6f, good) with wins there (good to soft) and at Bath (extended 5f, heavy); may well do better on good to firm as her dam's best form for this yard came on the same going."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Instant Bond",
        "jockey": "J F Egan",
        "trainer": "Michael Wigham",
        "ts": "16",
        "rpr": "70",

        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.32",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well beaten in two turf handicaps either side of a break in 2025 but he was off the mark on the AW in March and has run respectably in defeat since; might well have more to offer on this surface."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Mickey Mongoose (GB)",
        "jockey": "Warren Fentiman(3)",
        "trainer": "Olly Williams",
        "ts": "50",

        "fair_odds": "10.32",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole turf win came over 1m2f in 2023 and three subsequent successes have been on the AW (1m and 7f); has continued to run well since the latest of them in February but this is his first 6f run since his debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Profiteer (IRE)",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",

        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "71",

        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "46.7",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.13",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins in 2024, at 7f and 5f; mostly rather underpowered in 2025 and no obvious sign fitting headgear was a help in the autumn, but he's 10lb lower than on reappearance last April so there is handicapping hope."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Shark Two One (GB)",

        "ts": "66",

        "stall": 9,

        "fair_odds": "13.37",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five turf wins at 6f-7f, the latest two over the latter trip on this track; he's had some excuses for low-key reappearances in the past but it's still a stretch to expect him to be on song for this one."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "stall": 1,

        "fair_odds": "14.15",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-9.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two AW wins in January, over 6f and 7f; just averagely handicapped now and it's a long time since he's run well on turf but he wouldn't be out of it on past form on grass."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "ts": "38",
        "rpr": "70",

        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced maiden for two yards but he didn't get the best of runs after a slow start at Bath (first 5f run; good) and may well be ready to play more of a part now back at 6f following a further 3lb drop."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "edge": "-7.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 2yo AW maiden; his 3yo season never really got going but he was on a much-reduced mark when runner-up on two occasions (7f) in March; well held on yard debut since, though, and likely best watched back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,

        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not yet off the mark but she's had two close calls on the AW this year, notably when only just failing to get up at Wolverhampton (6f) in February, against one on the fifth leg of a seven-timer; acts on turf, too, and may well figure back from short break."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Ripon",

      {
        "rank": 1,

        "edge": "-10.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close second in this race (good) on her 2025 reappearance and went on to score twice at about 1m6f later in the year; returned with a career-best second of 13 at Musselburgh (1m6f, soft) three weeks ago, arguably deserving extra credit considering she met a bit of trouble; successful on her two other visits to Ripon; reasons to be positive."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Prydwen",
        "jockey": "Darragh Keenan",
        "trainer": "George Scott",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "89-682",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "58.1",
        "model_pct": "22.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.53",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last five outings on AW, posting his most encouraging effort when second of 12 in a 2m Newcastle Good Friday handicap; nudged back up 2lb for that but he's still 3lb lower than when runner-up at Chester (2m, good to soft) last September; should go well."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Prince Of The Seas (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "50318-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Sadler's Wells",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "58.0",
        "model_pct": "21.6%",
        "fair_odds": "4.63",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second career success when shading a tight finish at Goodwood (1m4f, good to firm) last August; ended the year with a poor run at Newcastle (1m4f) in September; subsequently sold out of Ralph Beckett's stable for 30,000gns; new yard runs three and the betting is perhaps the best guide to expectations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Stressfree (FR)",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",

        "fair_odds": "6.82",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Smart handicapper who won at Haydock (1m4f, good) off 4lb lower last May and recorded several good efforts in defeat later in 2025; has gone well fresh before."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ashnak",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "/423-8",
        "sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Gio Ponti",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "53.8",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "10.03",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Pretty useful at up to 1m4f in France but only eighth of 12 in 1m2f Doncaster handicap on British debut four weeks ago; the type to click for this yard at some point but possibly a bit further down the line."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Gibside (GB)",

        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "110",

        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "50.0",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.31",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Soft-ground winner over this trip at Catterick last autumn; hard to derive much encouragement from his recent Thirsk reappearance but the fact he's 2-3 over C&D (all 2022) provides some hope."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Navan",
    "time": "15:40",
    "race_name": "Irish Stallion Farms EBF Salsabil Stakes (Group 3) (Fillies)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good To Yielding",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Ice Dancer (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "013-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "62.5",
        "model_pct": "26.1%",
        "fair_odds": "3.83",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had a troubled run on debut; put that behind her when landing the odds in a 1m maiden at Gowran last September; ground was testing then, and same when she was third in a 1m Group 3 race at the Curragh in October; pedigree implies she can improve at this trip; Ryan Moore prefers her to Minerva who is rated 10lb superior (official and RPR figures)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Chasing Paradise",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "J P Murtagh",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2-1",
        "sire": "Churchill",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "60.8",
        "model_pct": "18.5%",
        "fair_odds": "5.42",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed promise when 7l second to an experienced Ballydoyle-trained filly over 1m at Leopardstown on sole start at two; stayed this trip well when a winning favourite on soft-to-heavy at the Curragh on reappearance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Emmeleia",
        "jockey": "Gavin Ryan",
        "trainer": "Donnacha Aidan O'Brien",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "2-1",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.5",
        "model_pct": "13.9%",
        "fair_odds": "7.21",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-14.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Half-sister by Camelot to 2025 Lingfield Derby Trial winner Puppet Master; won a 7f barrier trial at Leopardstown last August, second to the promising Yellowstone Lake n a 7f maiden at Dundalk in September; batted well to beat a stablemate over a bit further than this at Dundalk; needs to improve, drying ground should help."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Minerva (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "22431-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Showcasing",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.2",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.60",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran seven times at two, opening her account on final start, when odds-on in a 7f maiden at Leopardstown; best effort when second to top-class stablemate Diamond Necklace (unbeaten Prix Marcel Boussac winner) in a 7f Curragh conditions event; possible stamina doubt, and Ryan Moore prefers the lower-rated, less exposed Ice Dancer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Thundering On (GB)",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "42-2",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.0",
        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.97",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-7.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frankel filly, whose dam won the 1m2f Pretty Polly for this stable; fine effort on second juvenile start when second in 1m Group 3  at the Curragh, 4 3/4l in front of third-placed Ice Dancer; touched off in a 1m maiden at Leopardstown 13 days ago; trip will suit, stable in terrific form; could feature here despite her maiden status."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Bloom (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ronan Whelan",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "71-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "58.9",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.14",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Wootton Bassett filly out of a Listed winner by Galileo; stepped up from unplaced debut at Leopardstown to win a 1m maiden at Cork last September; stable's two other runners are more appealing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Camino Vino (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rory Cleary",
        "trainer": "Gavin Cromwell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Society Rock",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "53.0",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "27.99",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Invincible Spirit filly created a good impression when beating an 86-rated previous winner in a 1m maiden at Dundalk in December on her only juvenile start; interesting, although not guaranteed to stay as far as this on pedigree."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Haydock",
    "time": "15:45",
    "race_name": "William Hill Best Odds Guaranteed Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Strength Of Spirit",
        "jockey": "Jack Nicholls(5)",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "5121-1",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "63.5",
        "model_pct": "22.6%",
        "fair_odds": "4.43",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has taken great strides since winning a seller last June, winning with authority on handicap debut at Newbury (7f, good to firm) on final 2yo start and he again had reserves when successful at Musselburgh (1m, good to soft) this month; up 4lb but he's anything but exposed; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Commanding Officer (GER)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "341-",
        "sire": "Teofilo",
        "dam_sire": "Maxios",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "60.8",
        "model_pct": "17.0%",
        "fair_odds": "5.89",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran up against smart types on first two 7f starts, on this track and at York (both on good), keeping on pleasingly into third on debut, then ran to similar level next time; was in the right place at the right time, unlike the second, when winning a C&D novice in September; open to improvement as a 3yo; goes handicapping with cheekpieces fitted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Go Rimbaud",
        "jockey": "Tyler Heard",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "422-1",
        "sire": "Palace Pier",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "59.6",
        "model_pct": "15.0%",
        "fair_odds": "6.68",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-21.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Golden pedigree, dam had four Group 1 winners (at 1m up to 2m4f) among her siblings, including Friendly Soul for this yard; this one hasn't been as dynamic as the latter so far and his defeat of some newcomers and handicap prospects on Kempton AW (1m; made all) 17 days ago was hard to assess in merit terms; needs more now handicapping but that's quite possible."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "See Blue (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Richard Hughes",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "1-2",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Vale Of York",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "58.6",
        "model_pct": "13.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.42",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Hit the front in the nick of time when justifying support on his Kempton AW debut in September but he was easily outpointed by a promising type on Southwell reappearance (1m) last month, when much more use was made of him; interesting to see the tactics on turf debut but should do better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Dunkeld Dreamer (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "1222-5",
        "sire": "Coulsty",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "10.9%",
        "fair_odds": "9.21",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+5.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ten 2yo runs, winning three handicaps at about 1m (good to firm, good and soft); took a hefty rise for the latest of them and is now 12lb higher; creditable comeback at Musselburgh recently but surprising if she's well enough treated to win today; yard also runs Strength Of Spirit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Electrical (GB)",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Brian Toomey",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "184-",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Norse Dancer",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "51.8",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.39",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bred to stay further than 1m but was sharp enough to win 6f Newbury novice (good to firm) on debut; found wanting in two later runs but in Listed company first and soft ground may not have suited back at Newbury (1m); gelded since; this first handicap looks competitive."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Gold Dawn (GB)",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden who ran well in all three handicaps at 7f and 1m, making most when runner-up over this trip at Newmarket (good) in September; this looks a tough race in which to get off the mark; yard also runs Mr Seagull."
      },

        "rank": 8,

        "fair_odds": "22.91",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bright start, winning at Pontefract (6f, good to firm) then had work cut out trying to give weight to a promising newcomer on AW; big prices and well beaten in two sales races when last seen in September; gelded since and now goes in cheekpieces on handicap debut; faces a tough return upped to 1m."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.18",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Needed every yard of 7f on Ayr debut (good) in August but the further she went the better she looked; the step up to 1m should have suited on Kempton AW in October but she found disappointingly little; returns to action with something to prove."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Enjoyed a good spell on turf last summer, winning at Leopardstown in June off 66 (1m, good); moderate Dundalk run in March but creditable return to turf at Leopardstown when fourth of 17 (1m, good to yielding); in the mix."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back to form when recording a tenth win under rules' at Dundalk last month (7f); 6f perhaps a bit sharp back at Dundalk last time and was hampered turning in; she was a C&D winner last June off 5lb higher, so a few things in her favour back on turf."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just denied in a Galway maiden on debut last August over extended 1m trip (good to yielding); hasn't reproduced that form since, including in two handicap starts on heavy ground; could go well on seasonal return with the ground drying."

        "spotlight": "Three-time turf winner who appreciates an ease in the ground; 3lb above his last success in September at Roscommon (7.5f, soft); positive return to turf at Bellewstown (1m, soft) two weeks ago when fourth of 14 following a poor effort at Dundalk prior; no surprise to see him feature."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won twice for James Ferguson last year, including once on turf at Nottingham (8.5f, good) off 9lb lower and filled the runner-up spot the next twice; picked up for 10,000gns in October but was tailed off on stable debut at Bellewstown when badly hampered; all form has come on good or better."

        "spotlight": "Improved when visor was added to her tongue-tie last year, winning over C&D (good) and at Newmarket (good to firm) in August; starts this campaign 5lb above the mark she defied at Newmarket and might be best watched after 196 days off with both the visor and tongue-tie missing."

        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "53.5",

        "fair_odds": "7.90",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+5.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "None of today's opponents were foaled when he won his first race but this 12yo was still pretty useful last year, winning three times over 5f; the fact he's never won first time up suggests it may pay to look elsewhere this time, though."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "score": "52.3",
        "model_pct": "10.9%",
        "fair_odds": "9.16",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed three times on AW over the winter before resuming winning ways over 5f at Southwell 18 days ago; hasn't been successful above a mark of 76 so a career best will be needed if he's to follow up."
      },

        "rank": 5,

        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-12.4pp",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three-time winner over 6f in France who ran his best race in Britain when second of eight to same owner's Jakajaro at Newmarket (5f, good to soft) 11 days ago; bold show likely from an unchanged mark."
      },

        "rank": 6,

        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ten-time winner down the years for James Evans; drew a blank in 2025 but runner-up twice off marks in the 90s, including reappearance, so well treated starting out for Tony Carroll (same owners); interesting to see what the betting makes of him."
      },

        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Reopposing stablemate Vince L'Amour was ahead in second when sixth of 17 at Musselburgh (5f, good to soft) 13 days ago but it was still quite an encouraging return to action from this 5yo who has dipped to only 1lb above the mark he defied at Catterick (5f, good) last September."
      },

        "spotlight": "Took a good step forward from his reappearance when second (Equity Law sixth) of 17 at Musselburgh (5f, good to soft) 13 days ago; respected off only 1lb higher."
      }
    ]

        "spotlight": "On reduced mark and he returned from a break with a good second behind an improver at Bath (1m, good) three weeks ago; has claims if he can back that up but he's still a maiden 16 starts and has stamina to prove at this new trip."
      },

  {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Built on Wolverhampton comeback run (7f) when showing a willing attitude to make all at Nottingham (8.5f, good) last Saturday; 3lb rise isn't insurmountable but he is set to compete from a career-high mark, so further progress is required."
      },

        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dropped back in trip when getting off the mark at the 13th attempt at Nottingham (8.5f, good) latest; the winning margin there was just a nose but, with a 3lb rise, he remains on a reasonably competitive mark; Hollie Doyle is back aboard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Hostility",
        "jockey": "Mason Paetel(5)",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",

        "rpr": "85",

        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "53.0",
        "model_pct": "13.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.67",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden (0-14), runner-up five times, including in a 6f Southwell novice last November; ran respectably (keen) when fourth in a newly applied visor at Catterick (7f, good) latest; should stay a mile (first go) and is on a fair mark, more so if factoring in Mason Paetel's 5lb claim."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Keats House (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",

        "score": "52.2",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.58",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lit up by a visor (too keen) when a weakening third over C&D last June; did manage to win twice thereafter (with headgear discarded), including from 7lb lower at Musselburgh (1m, good to soft) in September; potentially vulnerable off a 192-day absence."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last turf win was here (1m2f, good to soft; from 6lb higher) in June 2024; fair third at Wolverhampton (8.5f; 10-1) on penultimate start but took a backward step at Doncaster (1m2f) subsequently; easing mark isn't enough to tempt."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In fine fettle last summer, winning at Pontefract (1m) and Nottingham (8.5f); found Poet's Dawn too strong at Carlisle (1m, soft; similar terms) in September; off since finishing third at Newcastle in October, so may strip fitter for this comeback run."
      },

      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Resumed winning ways at Beverley (8.5f, soft; from 2lb lower) last September but reportedly ran too freely when soundly beaten at Nottingham next time; caught the eye when fourth in a Class 4 at Southwell (1m; 40-1) recently, but it mightn't be wise to take that form literally."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both Flat wins came on AW (1m6f-2m); relatively quiet since winning over hurdles at Worcester (2m, maiden) last June; well beaten on recent Yarmouth comeback (1m2f), and he hasn't run over a mile since late 2024; others preferred."

        "spotlight": "Rallied to win a modest maiden at Ayr (1m, good; 11-2) last April; disappointing since introduced to handicapping, scarcely managing to beat a rival in three attempts (7f-1m); an easing mark could aid her cause on return from ten-month absence; stablemate of Poet's Dawn."
      }

        "cd": "",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising return to action at Chelmsford in October (6f) and that was off a 6lb higher mark; no progress since but 7f has stretched him on his last two starts and he returns to 6f in a lower grade; big player with cheekpieces added for the first time."

        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Strong at the finish when winning a 7f handicap at Doncaster last summer (good to soft); three lesser efforts followed and he returns from his 172 break over a trip that may be too sharp; he is drawn near some good pace though and looks worth a market check."

      {

        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Prominent racer; close second at Newcastle (6f) last month but he failed to back it up at Southwell three weeks ago; all his best efforts have come on a straight course so perhaps can be given the benefit of the doubt for last time; one of two runners for the stable; not discounted."

        "cd": "",

      }

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "edge": "-21.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten a nose on handicap debut at Newcastle (7f), after which he was gelded; won on Tapeta and Polytrack in next two starts and was a creditable second in his hat-trick bid at Kempton (7f) three weeks ago; still lightly raced and he's a big player if he can transfer his progress back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Chelio (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Denis Coakley",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "75",

        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "54.4",
        "model_pct": "13.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.28",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well held in his first two juvenile runs but he showed clear promise when runner-up in a Lingfield novice (1m, AW) in December; drops back in trip after a break but he pulled hard last time and is open to more progress on this handicap debut; interesting contender with Rossa Ryan booked."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Circle Of Trust (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Kevin Stott",
        "trainer": "Kevin Ryan",
        "ts": "64",

        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "12.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.87",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No progress in three qualifying runs but he found improvement upped to 7f on nursery debut when a strong-finishing second at Yarmouth (good to soft) in September; only 1lb higher than for that close call and he's an interesting contender with cheekpieces added on his return."
      },

        "spotlight": "Won novice/maiden events at Wolverhampton (7f) for Clive Cox on his first two runs; finished in rear in three handicaps for his current yard but he ran into plenty of trouble over 6f at Southwell 18 days ago; now makes his turf debut but he's on a reduced mark and is not ruled back up in trip."

    "runners": [
      {

        "edge": "-10.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made the breakthrough at Wolverhampton (6f, maiden; 4-1) in February; has bettered that since (on RPRs) with narrow defeats at Lingfield and Newcastle; 2lb higher again, but possible he can stake a claim if proving as effective on turf (debut)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Blue Nguru (GB)",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "59",

        "model_pct": "15.4%",
        "fair_odds": "6.47",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up at Hamilton and Catterick (6f fillies' maiden; first-time cheekpieces) prior to being slowly away at Lingfield (7f) in early December; took her chance - always handy - back there (5f novice) a fortnight later, and has been given a four-month break since; retains potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Liverpool Star",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",

        "ts": "70",

        "form": "24-343",

        "dam_sire": "Toronado",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "53.0",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.54",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Yet to win (0-10), going closest when beaten a head at Newcastle (6f nursery) in December; bumped at the start but recovered to do solid late work at Catterick (5f, good; third of ten, beaten 1l) 17 days ago; same mark (holds Contorno) for return to 6f."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Vencedora (IRE)",

        "rpr": "75",

        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.9",

        "edge": "+4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Shaped well on Haydock debut (third) and off the mark next time in a modest three-runner Newcastle novice (6f; 2-1; made all); possibly needed her recent comeback run at Southwell (7f; fifth of seven), and dropping back in trip looks sensible; chance, despite a poor draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "fair_odds": "9.81",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Rewarded for a series of consistent efforts when scrambling home in a 5f novice at Leicester (6-5 favourite) last October; gelded, and back from a winter break with the possibility of more to come; shouldn't be troubled by returning to 6f."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Siouxpersonic (IRE)",

        "fair_odds": "11.97",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-13.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "With Ed Bethell when knuckling down to land the odds in a 5f fillies' maiden at Southwell (runner-up 2-3 since) last September; joined this trainer the following month for 40,000gns; is fairly weighted back over 6f in handicap company."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Ecclefechan",
        "jockey": "Darragh Keenan",
        "trainer": "John Ryan",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "81",

        "dam_sire": "Twilight Son",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "46.8",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.77",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-8; lost out in tight finishes at Musselburgh (5f novice) and Lingfield (6f nursery) as a juvenile; gelded over the winter and fifth of eight on Kempton return (7f; 14-1, beaten 4l) six weeks ago; 1lb lower but likely needs a fraction more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Contorno",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Tom Tate",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "0-1415",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Shalaa",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "46.8",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "14.85",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dictated a steady pace to maintain his unbeaten Newcastle record (5f; 2-2) on penultimate start; no excuses when a weakening fifth (Liverpool Star third) on turf return at Catterick (5f, good; 6-1) 17 days ago; 2lb above last winning mark (AW)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "stall": 9,

        "fair_odds": "22.94",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Failed to progress for Brian Ellison (0-4; 5f-6f); hung left-handed and dropped out accordingly on recent stable debut at Beverley (7.5f; 13-2, eighth of ten); may draw benefit from that comeback run but others make way more appeal."
      },

        "rank": 10,

        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't offer much initially, but did at least get closer to the principals when fifth of ten on handicap debut at Pontefract (6f, nursery; soft; in a first-time tongue-tie) last October; hasn't that many miles on the clock but does lack a recent run; others preferred."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Raced exclusively over 6f since returning from a break in December, making the frame on three of his last five appearances (twice here); visored for first time since 2022 (has sometimes worn other headgear since); probably reliant on a good pace to aim at over this trip."

      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Al Azd",

        "stall": 6,

        "fair_odds": "3.55",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-11.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looks quirky but he followed three seconds at 1m/1m2f by asserting late on from Sailor Song in a 1m3f maiden at Southwell (AW) two weeks ago, looking suited by the extra distance; blinkered on last two starts; 2025 turf form to start career was modest but another extra furlong should help; player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sailor Song",
        "jockey": "Toby Moore(7)",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "422",
        "sire": "Zarak",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "63.0",
        "model_pct": "26.7%",
        "fair_odds": "3.74",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made debut in February; improved when second in maidens at Doncaster (1m2f, good to soft) and Southwell (1m3f, AW; under Toby Moore) and now has cheekpieces after Al Azd proved too strong for him late on in the latest race; should be competitive on handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Director's Cut",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "51-5",
        "sire": "Palace Pier",
        "dam_sire": "Kyllachy",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "56.4",
        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.98",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two runs in November were on AW, rallying to win a novice at Newcastle (1m) on second occasion; fair fifth of nine in a novice at Nottingham (1m2f, good) from the front on reappearance did not press his claims for today's handicap debut, but these are early days."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Alba Gu Brath",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "22-1",
        "sire": "Study Of Man",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "55.2",
        "model_pct": "10.9%",
        "fair_odds": "9.21",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made debut in December; runner-up on first two starts before making all at 4-9 in a five-runner novice at Newcastle in January; all those races were 1m on AW and he kept hanging left last time, but he makes a striking move up to 1m4f for this handicap/turf debut and needs a close look."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Lopeo (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "David Menuisier",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "415-",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "53.8",
        "model_pct": "9.3%",
        "fair_odds": "10.80",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed staying potential with a 1m win on heavy ground in three-runner race at Goodwood last September, which was far better than his starts either side; gelded since; should be capable of better this season switched to handicapping but it is needed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Shushi",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "44-3",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.49",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-12.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fair form on all three starts, best form on soft ground on second occasion; latest was her closest finish, though, when making most in a 1m3f maiden at Kempton (AW) and that performance suggests she will stay 1m4f; needs to find extra to get off the mark on this handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Stoneacre Donny (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "4613-",

        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "49.3",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.07",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "33-1 winner in an eight-runner novice at Thirsk (7f, soft) last September, coming from towards rear to lead in final strides; good third of seven in nursery at Nottingham (1m2f, good to soft; gelded since) in October made 1m4f looks plausible but he needs further improvement off the same mark."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "25,000gns yearling who's a half-sister to five winners, including Queues Likely (2-2 on Tapeta) and course winner Singoura; interesting to see how she goes in the market against stablemate Riviera Queen."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Came away with a subsequent winner, despite needing the experience, on her 6f Newcastle debut last September; didn't look to see out 7f from a wide stall when a beaten favourite on her next start here and retains potential for a yard in good form."
      },

        "spotlight": "4,600gns foal, 9,000gns yearling who's a half-sister to winners over various trips, notably Valiant (1m2f) and Culturati (6f-7f); yard 6-31 with 3yos on the AW this year and she's arguably the most interesting newcomer."
      },

  {

    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Delinquent",

        "rpr": "76",

        "fair_odds": "2.46",
        "best_dec": "1.83",
        "edge": "-27.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Stamina on the dam's side and he looked sure to be suited by the step up in trip over C&D last time having stayed on nicely on his 7f comeback here; hit traffic that evening and this is less competitive; for a yard in fine form, he has to be considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "What Fools Believe",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "668-71",

        "dam_sire": "Golden Horn",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "24.4%",
        "fair_odds": "4.10",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dam won twice over 1m for the Crisford yard and this filly appreciated the step up in trip when winning over C&D 16 days ago; that was only a 0-55 and she's 4lb higher in first-time headgear, but there could be better to come."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "My Champion (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ashley Lewis(5)",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "952-15",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Henrythenavigator",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "51.8",
        "model_pct": "17.4%",
        "fair_odds": "5.76",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+9.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First run beyond sprint trips when winning an ordinary, small-field Wolverhampton handicap (8.6f) in January; met traffic upped to 9.5f latest (first-time cheekpieces; switches to a visor here) and can't be ruled out under experienced 5lb claimer Ashley Lewis."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Safe Harbor (GB)",
        "jockey": "Neil Callan",
        "trainer": "Marco Botti",
        "ts": "52",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "354-",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "11.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.01",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Half-sister to a Wolverhampton 8.6f winner; showed enough in three 7f runs in the winter to suggest she'll be competitive now handicapping at a sensible level; back from a break, though, and needs to settle better than when last seen."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Kalokalo (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "Charles Hills",
        "ts": "14",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "63",

        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",

        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-9.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made all in a small-field Yarmouth nursery off 3lb lower last autumn; looked to go too hard in front on Tapeta in one more start and may well be able to get his own way tonight, in which case he'll be dangerous."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Record over C&D currently reads 22115112; didn't look to have any excuses in a race run to suit here three weeks ago and it's possible he's reached his ceiling mark now, but he's ultra consistent and looks set to get involved once again."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time course winner, all in the winter months, latterly off this mark in January; usually misses the break and again hung left when behind Marry The Night over C&D last time; a stronger pace would help for last year's winning yard."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins for Heather Main over 6f and he hasn't always convinced when tried over 7f, although he turned in a solid effort from the front over that trip last time; stamina the concern for his new trainer, who's been among winners with her jumpers lately."
